predicates.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_alien
predicates.description: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a Union citizen.

predicates.name: enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement
predicates.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying the Community right of free movement.

predicates.name: is_present_on_territory
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory.

predicates.name: meets_conditions_for_entry_or_residence
predicates.description: The alien meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

predicates.name: previously_met_conditions_for_entry_or_residence
predicates.description: The alien previously met but no longer meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

predicates.name: has_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The alien has illegal residence on the territory.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The alien is in possession of a valid travel document.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_passport
predicates.description: The alien is in possession of a valid passport.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_identity_document
predicates.description: The alien is in possession of a valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_national_authority
predicates.description: The alien has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country.

predicates.name: national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The national authority of the alien's country has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_within_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The alien falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: is_identified_alien
predicates.description: The alien is an identified alien based on possession of valid documents or recognition by national authority.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

predicates.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
predicates.description: There are reasons to believe the alien will abscond, having regard to the objective criteria.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination has been performed for the alien in the context of the risk of absconding assessment.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_exists
predicates.description: A risk of absconding exists for the alien.

predicates.name: criterion_no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
predicates.description: The person did not submit a residence application following their illegal entry.

predicates.name: criterion_no_residence_application_during_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The person did not submit a residence application during their illegal residence.

predicates.name: criterion_no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit
predicates.description: The person did not make their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by the Act.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_failure_to_submit_residence_application
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on failure to submit a residence application is met for the person.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or falsified documents in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person committed fraud in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_false_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on use of false information or documents is met for the person.

predicates.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for enforcement of alien regulations.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_non_cooperation
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on non-cooperation with authorities is met for the person.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_removal
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_removal
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_failure_to_comply_with_measures
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on failure to comply with measures is met for the person.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_existing_entry_ban
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on an existing entry ban is met for the person.

predicates.name: submitted_new_residence_application_after_refusal_or_termination
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence application immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, terminating residence, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

predicates.name: submitted_new_protection_application_after_refusal_or_termination
predicates.description: The person submitted a new application for international protection immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, terminating residence, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_new_application_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on submission of a new application immediately after a negative decision is met for the person.

predicates.name: questioned_about_prior_fingerprints
predicates.description: The person was questioned about prior fingerprints.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: The person concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for international protection.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_concealment_of_prior_fingerprints
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on concealment of prior fingerprints is met for the person.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_protection_applications_with_negative_outcomes
predicates.description: The person submitted multiple applications for international protection in the Kingdom or other Member States that gave rise to a negative decision or did not result in a residence permit.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_residence_applications_with_negative_outcomes
predicates.description: The person submitted multiple residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States that gave rise to a negative decision or did not result in a residence permit.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on multiple applications with negative outcomes is met for the person.

predicates.name: questioned_about_prior_protection_applications
predicates.description: The person was questioned about prior applications for international protection.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_protection_application_in_other_state
predicates.description: The person concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_concealment_of_prior_protection_application
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on concealment of a prior international protection application is met for the person.

predicates.name: declared_purpose_differs_from_application_purpose
predicates.description: The person declared that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

predicates.name: apparent_purpose_differs_from_application_purpose
predicates.description: It appears from the person's file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_declared_or_apparent_purpose_mismatch
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on declared or apparent purpose other than stated application is met for the person.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on a fine for a manifestly unlawful appeal is met for the person.

predicates.name: any_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one objective absconding criterion is met for the person.
